nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Joan Reresby was born in 1300, in Thrybergh, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Adam Reresby, was 30 and her mother, Thethegna Coombs, was 30. She had at least 4 sons and 4 daughters with John FitzWilliam. She died in 1342, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Joan Reresby est née en 1300, à Thrybergh, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Adam Reresby, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Thethegna Coombs, avait 30 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles avec John FitzWilliam. Elle est décédée en 1342, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Joan Reresby 1300 in Thrybergh, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Adam Reresby 30 und ihre Mutter Thethegna Coombs 30. Sie hatte mit John FitzWilliam mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1342 im Alter von 42 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joan Reresby è nata il nel 1300 nel Thrybergh, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir Adam Reresby, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Thethegna Coombs, aveva 30 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie con John FitzWilliam. Morì nel 1342, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Joan Reresbyが1300年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスリバーグで生まれた時，父Sir Adam Reresbyは30歳，母Thethegna Coombsは30歳であった。彼女はJohn FitzWilliamとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1342年に42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Joan Reresby(이)가 1300년 영국 요르크실르 스리버그h에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Adam Reresby(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Thethegna Coombs(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 John FitzWilliam(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1342년 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joan Reresby nasceu em 1300, em Thrybergh, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Adam Reresby, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Thethegna Coombs, tinha 30 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas com John FitzWilliam. Ela faleceu em 1342, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Joan Reresby родилась в 1300 г. в местности трибирг, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Adam Reresby было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Thethegna Coombs, 30. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери от John FitzWilliam. Она умерла в 1342 г. в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Joan Reresby nació en 1300, en Thrybergh, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Adam Reresby, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Thethegna Coombs, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas con John FitzWilliam. Murió en 1342, a la edad de 42 años.
